context: Both through to R16. Morocco unbeaten in group, strong press; Senegal physical, missing first-choice LB to suspension.
Holders Argentina rested key players last group game; Croatia's midfield controls tempo but legs are older.
France deep squad, scoring freely; Japan high-press, beat one favourite already this tournament.
Brazil flair vs a disciplined Dutch block; recent meetings tight and often decided late.
Classic rivalry. England solid defensively this run; Germany rebuilding but dangerous on transitions.
Iberian derby. Spain dominate possession; Portugal carry the bigger individual match-winners.
Co-host USA riding a loud home crowd; Belgium more talented on paper but ageing and inconsistent.
Heavyweight semi-final. Portugal's veteran core vs Brazil's pace in wide areas; both defences shaky under a high press.
Semi-final. Dutch youth and width against Croatia's veteran midfield control; Croatia rarely lose these tight knockout games.
